## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and technical optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic growth: Reached 700 clicks this month, aiming for 3,500-4,000 total; hit 1,000 weekly clicks for the first time](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Keyword rankings: Focusing on improving positions for key terms like "shoppable video" and "interactive video"](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Content quality: Discussions on balancing AI-assisted content with human editing to meet quality expectations](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Technical SEO: Identified need to implement schema markup and optimize for AI/chatbot search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [Reached 700 clicks this month, projecting 3,500-4,000 total despite slow start in January](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Hit 1,000 weekly clicks milestone (700 from GrowthX, 270 from existing articles)](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Content refreshes showing improved performance, reaching 100 clicks (up from 70)](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Aiming to consistently hit 1,000 weekly clicks by February](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### Keyword Rankings

  - [Tracking progress for key terms like "shoppable video" (position 8) and "interactive video" (dropped from 14 to 31)](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - Video commerce performing well, ranking \#4 in US
  - [Planning to optimize existing articles to improve rankings, especially for "interactive video"](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Discussing potential for 360-degree product video content](https://fathom.video/share/9xTv3KMSBjoVvq1_poac74ByAmGwwQr2?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
